text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
iii 
Tips on Navigating the Codebook 
This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare plan characteristics files. The guide 
includes several ways for users to quickly find the information they need: 
• 
A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS variable names 
• 
Individual entries for each
